title: YouTube CMS for Labels
metaTitle: YouTube CMS for Labels | Distrozi Music Distribution
metaDescription: Read about YouTube CMS for Labels. Learn how to distribute your music globally, protect copyrights, and maximize streaming royalties with Distrozi.
author: Distrozi Editorial Team

content.text: Managing a record label or music publishing company in the digital streaming age requires specialized enterprise tools. Generic retail distribution portals lack the security, roster control, and bulk accounting systems needed to scale. Distrozi provides B2B services, including YouTube CMS Network access, designed to help you manage your catalog and roster efficiently.

Distrozi's catalog dashboard allows label administrators to easily manage multiple artist rosters under a single dashboard. From automated royalty splits to bulk DDEX metadata ingestion, we strip away the complex administration of digital delivery, letting you focus on signing and developing talent.
2. Scalable API Pipelines and White-Label Dashboards

For larger media networks and startups, having branded portals is essential. Distrozi's white-label distribution system and robust REST APIs allow you to build proprietary upload dashboards and catalog management pipelines directly under your brand name, powered by our secure global infrastructure.
3. Direct YouTube CMS & Content Rights Integration

Labels need direct, clean pathways to whitelist channels and claim User Generated Content (UGC). Distrozi handles direct YouTube CMS mappings, meaning you don't have to deal with standard retail distributors acting as middlemen for your video assets.

faq.question: How does Distrozi handle royalty splits for record labels?
faq.answer: Our automated split engine lets you define custom splits for songwriters, producers, and performers, paying them out directly and saving your accounting team hours of work.

faq.question: Do you support custom API integrations for music distribution?
faq.answer: Yes. Distrozi offers fully documented REST API endpoints to build proprietary registration, upload, and reporting portals.
